title: AstraZeneca's trial flop raises a bigger question: Is its pipeline premium becoming more vulnerable?
summary_full: For years, AstraZeneca has commanded one of the richest valuations among large European pharma companies on the assumption that it consistently delivers results.
summary_public: For years, AstraZeneca has commanded one of the richest valuations among large European pharma companies on the assumption that it consistently delivers results.
